case_title: JUANA I VENEGAS VS. H & S PETROLEUM, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VENEGAS, JUANA I AS TO DEFENDANT H & S PETROLEUM, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
